meta.title: Dictum — Voice Dictation for macOS
hero.title:
Voice to text,
fully on-device.
hero.subtitle: Native macOS menu bar app for voice dictation. Speak, and the text appears where your cursor is. No cloud, no network, no data leaves your Mac.
features.label: Features
features.title: Everything runs on your Mac.
features.ondevice.title: 100% On-Device
features.ondevice.desc: WhisperKit runs on the Neural Engine, LLM runs on Metal via MLX. No data ever leaves your Mac.
features.paste.title: Auto-Paste
features.paste.desc: Transcribed text is automatically pasted wherever your cursor is. No copy-paste needed.
features.cleanup.title: LLM Cleanup
features.cleanup.desc: Optional local LLM pass to fix punctuation, grammar, and formatting before pasting.
features.context.title: Context-Aware
features.context.desc: Select text before dictating to give the LLM context. Per-app prompts for different workflows.
features.indicator.title: Floating Indicator
features.indicator.desc: Translucent pill at your text cursor shows recording state and audio level in real time.
features.menubar.title: Menu Bar Native
features.menubar.desc: Lives in your menu bar. Configurable hotkey, hold or toggle mode. Stays out of the way.
req.label: Requirements
req.title: What you need.
install.title: Installation
install.desc: Download the installer, run it, and you’re ready to go. The installer places Dictum in Applications automatically.
install.step1: Download Dictum.pkg from the button above and open it
install.step2: Follow the installer — Dictum will be placed in Applications
footer.copy: Dictum — on-device voice dictation for macOS
install.step3: Launch Dictum and follow the onboarding: grant permissions, download a speech model, and optionally an LLM
